absorption: ASK absorption at vPOC (60880). Buyers are active (positive delta) but price fails to move higher, indicating sellers are absorbing the buying pressure.
dom_observation: Significant stacked ask wall starting from 60900, acting as heavy resistance. Buyers are being absorbed at the 60880 level.
reasoning: Price is failing to gain acceptance above the vPOC, showing clear signs of ASK absorption against a large stacked ask wall, signaling a high-probability bearish reversal.
